title: GitHub Copilot issue on PyCharm
author: Blade 1
text:
I've been using GitHub Copilot plugin on PyCharm IDE for a while now. However, I recently encountered an issue where the plugin keeps turning off whenever I start writing a new line of code. Oddly, my GitHub subscription is still active. Any suggestions on how to troubleshoot and resolve this issue?
1 Answer
Update github copilot plugin.
Reauthenticate github copilot.
Reinstall the plugin.
Update PyCharm.
3 Comments
Blade
I logged in and out, removed and installed it again, and updated the plug in and restarted the system, still the moment I start coding it turns off.
Blade
Updating PyCharm got it fixed. Thanks for the suggestions.
Tigran Aivazian
It has not been working for several months now. I am surprised some people report that it (github copilot code completion in PyCharm) works. IT DOES NOT!
